name: Stripe
description: Stripe — Payment Gateway / PSP tool for developers

seo.title: Stripe Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Stripe analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Payment Gateway / PSP.

lock_in.data_portability: PCI Data Export (pm_/card_ to), CSV export
lock_in.explanation: Medium — proprietary tokens in vault, but PCI-to-PCI export available

when_to_use: SaaS with global customers needing fast integration
Companies wanting unified payments + billing stack
when_not_to_use: Need Merchant of Record (MoR) for tax compliance — use Paddle
Very high volume enterprise seeking lowest fees — consider Adyen

migration_cheatsheet.data_you_keep: PCI Data Export (pm_/card_ to), CSV export
migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: Medium — proprietary tokens in vault, but PCI-to-PCI export available
migration_cheatsheet.tip: Moderate effort required. Export data before canceling

review.verdict: Best for saas with global customers needing fast integration. Stripe offers usage-based at 2.9% + $0.30/transaction. Moderate vendor lock-in.
pros: SaaS with global customers needing fast integration
cons: Need Merchant of Record (MoR) for tax compliance
Very high volume enterprise seeking lowest fees
Proprietary data formats add switching costs
